narrative:
Hillsboro Nw (precinct in Highland County) has 1,346 registered voters, with 64.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
